content:
📜 2. Faction-Based Risks & Rewards – The Balance of Loyalty & Betrayal

📜 Being in a faction now has structured benefits and risks, depending on how it is played.

✔ Faction Benefits:
• Players gain access to faction-wide buffs & exclusive items.
• Certain faction-based actions require a collective vote, ensuring power dynamics.
• Example: The Archivists can pause a faction-wide debuff once per game.

✔ Faction Risks:
• If a faction member is caught betraying, the entire faction suffers a debuff.
• If a faction is too powerful, random events will target them to balance power.
• Example: The Trickster Cult may receive public backlash for deception-based wins.

✔ Exile Bonuses & Penalties:
• If a player is exiled from a faction, they gain a huge personal power-up but become a lone wolf.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 484 (chunk 484/555)
